Pruebas de Estrés

Salamanca Tostado Victor Alfredo

2025-03-21

Estimación de la Probabildiad de Incumplimiento del portafolio de Tarjetas de Crédito

library(tidyverse)
## Warning: package 'tidyverse' was built under R version 4.4.3
## Warning: package 'readr' was built under R version 4.4.2
## Warning: package 'dplyr' was built under R version 4.4.2

library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
data <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\valfr\\OneDrive\\Documents\\ACTUARÍA\\ADMON. INT. DE RIESGOS\\PROYECTO 2\\Proyecto 2.xlsx", sheet = "Datos")
head(data)
## # A tibble: 6 × 6
##    Fecha   TBM  BBVA Banamex Santander Banorte
##    <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>   <dbl>     <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 201501  16.6  15.4    17.8      15.9    15.3
## 2 201502  16.8  15.5    18.2      15.7    15.5
## 3 201503  16.9  15.8    18.3      15.4    15.9
## 4 201504  16.9  15.9    18.5      15.6    16.1
## 5 201505  16.9  15.9    18.4      15.6    16.2
## 6 201506  16.6  15.5    18.5      15.3    16.2
# Realiza gráficos exploratorios para cada banco
ggplot(data, aes(x = Fecha, y = BBVA)) +
  geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Probabilidad de Incumplimiento")

ggplot(data, aes(x = Fecha, y = Banamex)) +
  geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Probabilidad de Incumplimiento")

ggplot(data, aes(x = Fecha, y = Banorte)) +
  geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Probabilidad de Incumplimiento")

ggplot(data, aes(x = Fecha, y = Santander)) +
  geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Probabilidad de Incumplimiento")

ggplot(data, aes(x = Fecha, y = TBM)) +
  geom_line() +
  ggtitle("Probabilidad de Incumplimiento")

Variables Inegi

inegi <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\valfr\\OneDrive\\Documents\\ACTUARÍA\\ADMON. INT. DE RIESGOS\\PROYECTO 2\\datos_series_inegi1.xlsx")
head(inegi)
## # A tibble: 6 × 10
##    Fecha `Variable 1` `Variable 2` `Variable 3` `Variable 4` `Variable 5`
##    <dbl>        <dbl>        <dbl>        <dbl>        <dbl>        <dbl>
## 1 201501         3.1          118.         2.57         99.8         3.07
## 2 201502         3.29         117.         3.33        102.          4.47
## 3 201503         1.21         124.         2.91         99.7         3.03
## 4 201504         1.84         118.         2.09         99.0         2.07
## 5 201505         2.52         112.         1.85         99.5         1.96
## 6 201506         1            113.         2.04         99.4         1.95
## # ℹ 4 more variables: `Variable 6` <dbl>, `Variable 7` <dbl>,
## #   `Variable 8` <dbl>, `Variable 9` <dbl>

Variables Banxico

banx <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\valfr\\OneDrive\\Documents\\ACTUARÍA\\ADMON. INT. DE RIESGOS\\PROYECTO 2\\datos banxico.xlsx")
## New names:
## • `Subyacente` -> `Subyacente...3`
## • `No_Subyacente` -> `No_Subyacente...4`
## • `Subyacente` -> `Subyacente...11`
## • `No_Subyacente` -> `No_Subyacente...12`
head(banx)
## # A tibble: 6 × 19
##    Fecha   IPC Subyacente...3 No_Subyacente...4  ITCR  TDRC TIIE28
##    <dbl> <dbl>          <dbl>             <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>  <dbl>
## 1 201501  87.1           88.2              84.1  76.7  2.67    3.3
## 2 201502  87.3           88.5              83.8  77.4  2.81    3.3
## 3 201503  87.6           88.7              84.5  77.3  3.04    3.3
## 4 201504  87.4           88.8              83.3  77.9  2.97    3.3
## 5 201505  87.0           88.9              81.3  79.6  2.98    3.3
## 6 201506  87.1           89.1              81.3  80.3  2.96    3.3
## # ℹ 12 more variables: Depositos_Ahorro <dbl>, CAT <dbl>, INPC <dbl>,
## #   Subyacente...11 <dbl>, No_Subyacente...12 <dbl>, IMTG <dbl>, IMTS <dbl>,
## #   IMRS <dbl>, IMRTC <dbl>, Salario_Contractual <dbl>, Salario_Minimo <dbl>,
## #   Prom_Remesas_Familiares <dbl>
#Le asignamos el mismo formato de fecha a todos los archivos
data$Fecha <- as.Date(paste0(substr(data$Fecha, 1, 4), "-", substr(data$Fecha, 5, 6), "-01"))
banx$Fecha <- as.Date(paste0(substr(banx$Fecha, 1, 4), "-", substr(banx$Fecha, 5, 6), "-01"))
inegi$Fecha <- as.Date(paste0(substr(inegi$Fecha, 1, 4), "-", substr(inegi$Fecha, 5, 6), "-01"))
#Comprobacion de formato
head(data$Fecha)
## [1] "2015-01-01" "2015-02-01" "2015-03-01" "2015-04-01" "2015-05-01"
## [6] "2015-06-01"
head(banx$Fecha)
## [1] "2015-01-01" "2015-02-01" "2015-03-01" "2015-04-01" "2015-05-01"
## [6] "2015-06-01"
head(inegi$Fecha)
## [1] "2015-01-01" "2015-02-01" "2015-03-01" "2015-04-01" "2015-05-01"
## [6] "2015-06-01"
merged_df <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Fecha", all.x = TRUE), list(data, inegi, banx))
View(merged_df)

Valores faltantes:

colSums(is.na(merged_df))
##                   Fecha                     TBM                    BBVA 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##                 Banamex               Santander                 Banorte 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##              Variable 1              Variable 2              Variable 3 
##                       7                       7                       8 
##              Variable 4              Variable 5              Variable 6 
##                       8                       8                       8 
##              Variable 7              Variable 8              Variable 9 
##                       8                       8                       8 
##                     IPC          Subyacente...3       No_Subyacente...4 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##                    ITCR                    TDRC                  TIIE28 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##        Depositos_Ahorro                     CAT                    INPC 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##         Subyacente...11      No_Subyacente...12                    IMTG 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##                    IMTS                    IMRS                   IMRTC 
##                       0                       0                       0 
##     Salario_Contractual          Salario_Minimo Prom_Remesas_Familiares 
##                       0                       0                       0

Usamos la media de cada columna para rellenar los valores faltantes.

# Rellenar valores faltantes con la media de la columna
for (col in colnames(merged_df)) {
  if (any(is.na(merged_df[[col]]))) {
    merged_df[[col]][is.na(merged_df[[col]])] <- mean(merged_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  }
}

Modelos de Regresión Logística

# Modelo Regresión logística BBVA
modelo1<- glm( BBVA ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2`+ `Variable 3`+ `Variable 4`+ `Variable 5`+ `Variable 6`+ `Variable 7`+ `Variable 8`+ `Variable 9`+ IPC + `Subyacente...3`+`No_Subyacente...4`+ ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + `Subyacente...11` + `No_Subyacente...12` + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, 
              data = merged_df)

# Ver los resultados del modelo
summary(modelo1)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = BBVA ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2` + `Variable 3` + 
##     `Variable 4` + `Variable 5` + `Variable 6` + `Variable 7` + 
##     `Variable 8` + `Variable 9` + IPC + Subyacente...3 + No_Subyacente...4 + 
##     ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + Subyacente...11 + 
##     No_Subyacente...12 + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + 
##     Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, data = merged_df)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                          Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)              -5.02848    8.29821  -0.606 0.546026    
## `Variable 1`             -0.06295    0.03372  -1.867 0.065075 .  
## `Variable 2`             -0.03327    0.02000  -1.664 0.099524 .  
## `Variable 3`              0.02513    0.13248   0.190 0.849945    
## `Variable 4`             -0.17204    0.18943  -0.908 0.366153    
## `Variable 5`              0.18973    0.31946   0.594 0.554020    
## `Variable 6`             -0.47502    0.48745  -0.975 0.332356    
## `Variable 7`              0.45446    0.56669   0.802 0.424647    
## `Variable 8`             -0.20708    0.37241  -0.556 0.579535    
## `Variable 9`              0.29404    0.16593   1.772 0.079696 .  
## IPC                      10.36448    4.49712   2.305 0.023434 *  
## Subyacente...3           -7.72126    3.37981  -2.285 0.024640 *  
## No_Subyacente...4        -2.53963    1.12486  -2.258 0.026327 *  
## ITCR                      0.00598    0.01482   0.403 0.687607    
## TDRC                      1.39609    0.71863   1.943 0.055107 .  
## TIIE28                   -1.76375    0.74811  -2.358 0.020512 *  
## Depositos_Ahorro         -0.05552    0.09407  -0.590 0.556474    
## CAT                       1.45528    0.43904   3.315 0.001314 ** 
## INPC                     14.23997    8.11411   1.755 0.082595 .  
## Subyacente...11         -12.39118    6.08272  -2.037 0.044512 *  
## No_Subyacente...12       -3.59704    2.00930  -1.790 0.076712 .  
## IMTG                      1.17988    0.34287   3.441 0.000873 ***
## IMTS                     -3.02643    0.65027  -4.654 1.09e-05 ***
## IMRS                      0.32853    0.34550   0.951 0.344168    
## IMRTC                     0.51823    0.26797   1.934 0.056194 .  
## Salario_Contractual      -0.10814    0.06542  -1.653 0.101720    
## Salario_Minimo           -0.01814    0.01006  -1.803 0.074634 .  
## Prom_Remesas_Familiares  -0.01323    0.00676  -1.957 0.053326 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for gaussian family taken to be 0.3976991)
## 
##     Null deviance: 470.318  on 119  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance:  36.588  on  92  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 256.01
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 2
# Modelo Regresión logística TBM
modelo2<- glm( TBM ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2`+ `Variable 3`+ `Variable 4`+ `Variable 5`+ `Variable 6`+ `Variable 7`+ `Variable 8`+ `Variable 9`+ IPC + `Subyacente...3`+`No_Subyacente...4`+ ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + `Subyacente...11` + `No_Subyacente...12` + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, 
              data = merged_df)

# Ver los resultados del modelo
summary(modelo2)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = TBM ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2` + `Variable 3` + 
##     `Variable 4` + `Variable 5` + `Variable 6` + `Variable 7` + 
##     `Variable 8` + `Variable 9` + IPC + Subyacente...3 + No_Subyacente...4 + 
##     ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + Subyacente...11 + 
##     No_Subyacente...12 + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + 
##     Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, data = merged_df)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                           Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)               0.118679   8.364295   0.014  0.98871    
## `Variable 1`             -0.040411   0.033986  -1.189  0.23748    
## `Variable 2`             -0.035209   0.020156  -1.747  0.08401 .  
## `Variable 3`             -0.129198   0.133532  -0.968  0.33581    
## `Variable 4`             -0.199865   0.190939  -1.047  0.29796    
## `Variable 5`              0.089047   0.322003   0.277  0.78275    
## `Variable 6`             -0.292496   0.491326  -0.595  0.55309    
## `Variable 7`              0.307779   0.571206   0.539  0.59131    
## `Variable 8`              0.017694   0.375380   0.047  0.96251    
## `Variable 9`              0.272369   0.167254   1.628  0.10684    
## IPC                      14.583477   4.532931   3.217  0.00179 ** 
## Subyacente...3          -11.006828   3.406725  -3.231  0.00171 ** 
## No_Subyacente...4        -3.541812   1.133813  -3.124  0.00239 ** 
## ITCR                      0.027017   0.014942   1.808  0.07385 .  
## TDRC                      1.075223   0.724350   1.484  0.14112    
## TIIE28                   -1.612168   0.754067  -2.138  0.03517 *  
## Depositos_Ahorro         -0.085930   0.094820  -0.906  0.36717    
## CAT                       1.148824   0.442533   2.596  0.01098 *  
## INPC                     12.667440   8.178728   1.549  0.12486    
## Subyacente...11         -11.378404   6.131158  -1.856  0.06668 .  
## No_Subyacente...12       -3.256404   2.025297  -1.608  0.11129    
## IMTG                      1.578948   0.345605   4.569 1.52e-05 ***
## IMTS                     -3.739777   0.655450  -5.706 1.40e-07 ***
## IMRS                      0.566477   0.348255   1.627  0.10724    
## IMRTC                     0.666724   0.270099   2.468  0.01542 *  
## Salario_Contractual      -0.080875   0.065938  -1.227  0.22312    
## Salario_Minimo           -0.005268   0.010139  -0.520  0.60463    
## Prom_Remesas_Familiares  -0.012047   0.006813  -1.768  0.08036 .  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for gaussian family taken to be 0.4040584)
## 
##     Null deviance: 776.474  on 119  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance:  37.173  on  92  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 257.92
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 2
# Modelo Regresión logística Banamex
modelo3<- glm( Banamex ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2`+ `Variable 3`+ `Variable 4`+ `Variable 5`+ `Variable 6`+ `Variable 7`+ `Variable 8`+ `Variable 9`+ IPC + `Subyacente...3`+`No_Subyacente...4`+ ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + `Subyacente...11` + `No_Subyacente...12` + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, 
              data = merged_df)

# Ver los resultados del modelo
summary(modelo3)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Banamex ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2` + `Variable 3` + 
##     `Variable 4` + `Variable 5` + `Variable 6` + `Variable 7` + 
##     `Variable 8` + `Variable 9` + IPC + Subyacente...3 + No_Subyacente...4 + 
##     ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + Subyacente...11 + 
##     No_Subyacente...12 + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + 
##     Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, data = merged_df)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                           Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)              11.106877   8.877882   1.251   0.2141    
## `Variable 1`             -0.032770   0.036072  -0.908   0.3660    
## `Variable 2`             -0.004326   0.021394  -0.202   0.8402

## Depositos_Ahorro         -0.058923   0.100643  -0.585   0.5597    
## CAT                       1.201622   0.469706   2.558   0.0122 *  
## INPC                     14.636477   8.680921   1.686   0.0952 .  
## Subyacente...11         -12.133955   6.507625  -1.865   0.0654 .  
## No_Subyacente...12       -3.758112   2.149655  -1.748   0.0838 .  
## IMTG                      1.029761   0.366826   2.807   0.0061 ** 
## IMTS                     -3.065168   0.695697  -4.406 2.84e-05 ***

## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for gaussian family taken to be 0.455202)

## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 2
# Modelo Regresión logística Santander
modelo4<- glm( Santander ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2`+ `Variable 3`+ `Variable 4`+ `Variable 5`+ `Variable 6`+ `Variable 7`+ `Variable 8`+ `Variable 9`+ IPC + `Subyacente...3`+`No_Subyacente...4`+ ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + `Subyacente...11` + `No_Subyacente...12` + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, 
              data = merged_df)

# Ver los resultados del modelo
summary(modelo4)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Santander ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2` + `Variable 3` + 
##     `Variable 4` + `Variable 5` + `Variable 6` + `Variable 7` + 
##     `Variable 8` + `Variable 9` + IPC + Subyacente...3 + No_Subyacente...4 + 
##     ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + Subyacente...11 + 
##     No_Subyacente...12 + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + 
##     Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, data = merged_df)
## 
## Coefficients:
##                           Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)              -1.644150   8.224377  -0.200  0.84199    
## `Variable 1`             -0.026280   0.033417  -0.786  0.43365    
## `Variable 2`             -0.043222   0.019819  -2.181  0.03175 *  
## `Variable 3`             -0.125646   0.131298  -0.957  0.34110    
## `Variable 4`             -0.081047   0.187745  -0.432  0.66698    
## `Variable 5`              0.025190   0.316617   0.080  0.93676    
## `Variable 6`             -0.140355   0.483107  -0.291  0.77207    
## `Variable 7`              0.129023   0.561651   0.230  0.81882    
## `Variable 8`              0.100033   0.369100   0.271  0.78698    
## `Variable 9`              0.161505   0.164456   0.982  0.32865    
## IPC                      20.864822   4.457103   4.681 9.79e-06 ***
## Subyacente...3          -15.698179   3.349737  -4.686 9.59e-06 ***
## No_Subyacente...4        -5.096859   1.114847  -4.572 1.50e-05 ***
## ITCR                      0.023859   0.014692   1.624  0.10780    
## TDRC                      0.767091   0.712233   1.077  0.28429    
## TIIE28                   -1.248371   0.741453  -1.684  0.09563 .  
## Depositos_Ahorro         -0.033296   0.093234  -0.357  0.72182    
## CAT                       0.776894   0.435130   1.785  0.07749 .  
## INPC                      6.747126   8.041914   0.839  0.40365    
## Subyacente...11          -6.603821   6.028595  -1.095  0.27619    
## No_Subyacente...12       -1.765195   1.991418  -0.886  0.37771    
## IMTG                      1.761756   0.339824   5.184 1.28e-06 ***
## IMTS                     -3.570278   0.644486  -5.540 2.86e-07 ***
## IMRS                     -0.213593   0.342429  -0.624  0.53433    
## IMRTC                     0.864712   0.265580   3.256  0.00158 ** 
## Salario_Contractual      -0.068436   0.064835  -1.056  0.29394    
## Salario_Minimo            0.004185   0.009970   0.420  0.67565    
## Prom_Remesas_Familiares  -0.010043   0.006699  -1.499  0.13727    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## (Dispersion parameter for gaussian family taken to be 0.3906532)
## 
##     Null deviance: 412.48  on 119  degrees of freedom
## Residual deviance:  35.94  on  92  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 253.87
## 
## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 2
# Modelo Regresión logística Banorte
modelo5<- glm( Banorte ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2`+ `Variable 3`+ `Variable 4`+ `Variable 5`+ `Variable 6`+ `Variable 7`+ `Variable 8`+ `Variable 9`+ IPC + `Subyacente...3`+`No_Subyacente...4`+ ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + `Subyacente...11` + `No_Subyacente...12` + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, 
              data = merged_df)

# Ver los resultados del modelo
summary(modelo5)
## 
## Call:
## glm(formula = Banorte ~ `Variable 1` + `Variable 2` + `Variable 3` + 
##     `Variable 4` + `Variable 5` + `Variable 6` + `Variable 7` + 
##     `Variable 8` + `Variable 9` + IPC + Subyacente...3 + No_Subyacente...4 + 
##     ITCR + TDRC + TIIE28 + Depositos_Ahorro + CAT + INPC + Subyacente...11 + 
##     No_Subyacente...12 + IMTG + IMTS + IMRS + IMRTC + Salario_Contractual + 
##     Salario_Minimo + Prom_Remesas_Familiares, data = merged_df)

## 
## (Dispersion parameter for gaussian family taken to be 0.6742624)

## Residual deviance:   62.032  on  92  degrees of freedom
## AIC: 319.36

## Number of Fisher Scoring iterations: 2

Modelos de Regresión Múltiple con penalización de Ridge

# Modelo BBVA com penalizacion de Ridge

# Preparar los datos para glmnet
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$BBVA

# Regresión con penalización Ridge
modelR1 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Ridge
coef(modelR1)

plot(modelR1)

# Modelo TBM com penalizacion de Ridge

# Preparar los datos para glmnet
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$TBM

#Regresión con penalización Ridge
modelR2 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Ridge
coef(modelR2)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"

## Prom_Remesas_Familiares  0.004364342  0.004523032  0.004640132  0.004769906
plot(modelR2)

# Modelo Banamex com penalizacion de Ridge

# Preparar los datos para glmnet
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Banamex

#Regresión con penalización Ridge
modelR3 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Ridge
coef(modelR3)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"
##   [[ suppressing 100 column names 's0', 's1', 's2' ... ]]
##                                                                                
## (Intercept)              1.428916e+01  1.468561e+01  1.472365e+01  1.476527e+01

## Subyacente...11          0.082608814  0.083846830  0.083526993  0.080466513
## No_Subyacente...12      -0.058533433 -0.059354462 -0.060213034 -0.061089384
## IMTG                     0.003286428  0.015805192  0.028439942  0.041394897
## IMTS                    -0.517886005 -0.533635752 -0.550078376 -0.567215575
## IMRS                    -0.382069179 -0.380048353 -0.377301905 -0.374135746
## IMRTC                   -0.425822631 -0.431651191 -0.436853872 -0.441288995
## Salario_Contractual     -0.042082870 -0.040615928 -0.039053301 -0.037575259
## Salario_Minimo          -0.006590866 -0.006766333 -0.006925823 -0.007083955
## Prom_Remesas_Familiares  0.001545278  0.001666766  0.001787530  0.001877484
plot(modelR3)

# Modelo Santander com penalizacion de Ridge

# Preparar los datos para glmnet
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Santander

# Regresión con penalización Ridge
modelR4 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Ridge
coef(modelR4)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"
##   [[ suppressing 100 column names 's0', 's1', 's2' ... ]]

## Prom_Remesas_Familiares  0.008210067  0.008214115  0.008170077  0.008106789
plot(modelR4)

# Modelo Banorte com penalizacion de Ridge

# Preparar los datos para glmnet
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Banorte

#Regresión con penalización Ridge
modelR5 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Ridge
coef(modelR5)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"

plot(modelR5)

Modelos de Regresión Múltiple con penalización de Lasso

# Modelo Regresión con penalización Lasso BBVA
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$BBVA



modelL1 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 1)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Lasso
coef(modelL1)

## INPC                     9.708511372  9.972474179
## Subyacente...11         -9.046823130 -9.248102596
## No_Subyacente...12      -2.490151789 -2.555689546
## IMTG                     1.321251038  1.322534173
## IMTS                    -3.549637452 -3.551952128
## IMRS                     0.578345556  0.578950008
## IMRTC                    0.709190052  0.709210117
## Salario_Contractual     -0.075867143 -0.076464662
## Salario_Minimo          -0.017167543 -0.017331910
## Prom_Remesas_Familiares -0.011834921 -0.011963718
plot(modelL1)

# Modelo Regresión con penalización Lasso TBM
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$TBM

modelL2 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 1)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Lasso
coef(modelL2)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"

## Prom_Remesas_Familiares -0.010619433 -0.010773007 -0.010909992
plot(modelL2)

# Modelo Regresión con penalización Lasso Banamex
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Banamex

modelL3 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 1)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Lasso
coef(modelL3)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"

## Prom_Remesas_Familiares -0.007977823 -0.008188053 -0.008370462
plot(modelL3)

# Modelo Regresión con penalización Lasso Santander
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Santander



modelL4 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 1)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Lasso
coef(modelL4)

## Prom_Remesas_Familiares -0.006090308
plot(modelL4)

# Modelo Regresión con penalización Lasso Banorte
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Banorte

modelL5 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 1)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Lasso
coef(modelL5)

plot(modelL5)

Modelo de Regresión Múltiple con Penalización Elastic Net

# Modelo de Regresión con penalización Elastic Net BBVA
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$BBVA

modelEN1 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0.5)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Elastic Net
coef(modelEN1)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"

## IMRTC                    0.690584957  0.692392007  0.69391870
## Salario_Contractual     -0.066991136 -0.067908318 -0.06878857

## Prom_Remesas_Familiares -0.009656764 -0.009902044 -0.01013270
plot(modelEN1)

# Modelo de Regresión con penalización Elastic Net TBM
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$TBM

modelEN2 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0.5)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Elastic Net
coef(modelEN2)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"

## Prom_Remesas_Familiares -0.0089913896 -0.009205558 -0.009427411 -0.009619119
plot(modelEN2)

# Modelo de Regresión con penalización Elastic Net Banamex
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Banamex

modelEN3 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0.5)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Elastic Net
coef(modelEN3)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"

## No_Subyacente...12      -6.471474e-01 -0.7473841316 -0.852116212 -0.954244928
## IMTG                     1.113657e+00  1.1203807538  1.126572381  1.132511265
## IMTS                    -3.428819e+00 -3.4489987536 -3.465632992 -3.479997620
## IMRS                     7.641699e-01  0.7733487869  0.781430858  0.788255742
## IMRTC                    5.516157e-01  0.5584943114  0.563571636  0.567697024
## Salario_Contractual      2.652366e-02  0.0259601700  0.025087138  0.024191748
## Salario_Minimo           9.971945e-03  0.0099171965  0.009875725  0.009851909
## Prom_Remesas_Familiares -6.830712e-03 -0.0070111223 -0.007195915 -0.007379637
plot(modelEN3)

# Modelo de Regresión con penalización Elastic Net Santander
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Santander

modelEN4 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0.5)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Elastic Net
coef(modelEN4)
## 28 x 100 sparse Matrix of class "dgCMatrix"

## Prom_Remesas_Familiares -9.277083e-03 -9.432243e-03 -9.580410e-03
plot(modelEN4)

# Modelo de Regresión con penalización Elastic Net Banorte
x <- as.matrix(merged_df[, c("Variable 1", "Variable 2", "Variable 3", "Variable 4", "Variable 5", "Variable 6", "Variable 7", "Variable 8", "Variable 9", "IPC" ,"Subyacente...3","No_Subyacente...4", "ITCR",  "TDRC" , "TIIE28" , "Depositos_Ahorro", "CAT" , "INPC" , "Subyacente...11" , "No_Subyacente...12" , "IMTG", "IMTS", "IMRS" , "IMRTC", "Salario_Contractual", "Salario_Minimo" , "Prom_Remesas_Familiares")])
y <- merged_df$Banorte

modelEN1 <- glmnet(x, y, family = "gaussian", alpha = 0.5)

# Ver los coeficientes del modelo Elastic Net
coef(modelEN1)
